name: Bushel of Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Incorporate the maple syrup, milk, and vanilla extract, stirring to combine.
4. Gradually stir in the oats, raisins, and pecans.
5. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
6. Fold this dry mixture into the oat mixture until just combined.
7. Gently fold in the butterscotch chips.
8. Cover the batter and refrigerate for 2 hours to allow it to firm up.
9. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
10. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto greased baking sheets.
11. Bake for 15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
Note: Source information and attribution have been removed as per instructions.
